mapper.select: select count(*) from tb_userinfo where loginID=#{loginID}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_userinfo (loginID, user_type, password, chk_tem_password, email, reg_date, status) values (#{id},'I',#{password},'Y',#{email}, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR), 'W')
mapper.select: select email from tb_userinfo where loginID=#{loginID} and user_type='I' and status='W'
mapper.update: update tb_userinfo set user_type='I', name=#{name}, password=#{password}, chk_tem_password='N', zipcode=#{zipcode}, addr1=#{addr1}, addr2=#{addr2}, birthday=#{birthday}, phone=#{phone}, edu_level=#{edu_level}, career=#{career}, img_name=#{img_name}, img_logi_path=#{img_logi_path}, img_phy_path=#{img_phy_path}, status = 'R' where loginID=#{loginID} and email=#{email}
